TITLE: Optimize Compressor Wheel Design for High-Altitude Efficiency
DESCRIPTION: Modify blade curvature to improve pressure ratio and efficiency under high altitude low-density air conditions.

TITLE: Replace CAN Transceiver for ISO 26262 ASIL-B Compliance
DESCRIPTION: Upgrade existing transceiver to ASIL-B certified hardware to meet functional safety requirements for EV communication bus.

TITLE: Update Safety Bootloader Cryptographic Algorithm
DESCRIPTION: Upgrade SHA-256 validation to include HMAC key signature checks during boot sequence to secure safety-critical firmware.

TITLE: Modify Wastegate Actuator Bracket to Reduce Vibration
DESCRIPTION: Reinforce bracket geometry to prevent resonance failures and micro-cracking observed during thermal vibration testing.

TITLE: Enhance Gateway Firewall Rules for OBD-II Access
DESCRIPTION: Permit unrestricted diagnostic messages over secondary CAN subnet. Rejected due to cybersecurity vulnerability risks.

TITLE: Emergency Thermal Shield Redesign
DESCRIPTION: Thermal tests failed, need titanium alloy shield.
